versions.text:
| Title        | Remuneration,
etc., of Judges.                                                              |

The remuneration and other terms and conditions of service of a Judge of the Supreme Court or of a High Court shall be as provided in the Fifth Schedule.

| Title        | Remuneration,
etc., of Judges.                                                              |

The remuneration and other terms and conditions of service of a Judge of the Federal Constitutional Court or Supreme Court or of a High Court shall be as provided in the Fifth Schedule.
